start.text:
Hi! I'm Jana 👋
Welcome to GITProNet.

We're building People-First AI — AI that empowers professionals instead of replacing them.

What would you like to explore?

about_gitpronet.text:
GITProNet (Global IT Professionals Network) is a professional association that brings together IT, Support, and Management professionals to build a People-First AI economy.

Our mission:
• AI should empower professionals — not replace them
• Professionals can co-create and co-own platforms
• Communities benefit from AI-assisted services

What would you like to explore next?

certifications_overview.text:
GITProNet offers three professional certification tracks:

• CAIDP — Certified AI Developer Professional
• CAIESP — Certified AI-Enabled Support Professional
• CAIMP — Certified AI-Enabled Management Professional

Each program includes hands-on projects, mentorship, and real ecosystem opportunities.

Which certification would you like to explore?

caidp_detail.text:
CAIDP (Certified AI Developer Professional) prepares developers to build real AI-powered systems.

You will learn:
• AI agent workflows
• API integrations
• Data pipelines
• Responsible AI design

Graduates contribute to projects on PeopleAIHub.

caiesp_detail.text:
CAIESP (Certified AI-Enabled Support Professional) prepares professionals to deliver services using AI assistants.

You will learn:
• Client intake workflows
• Documentation support
• Service coordination
• Ethics and privacy handling

Graduates can become JanMitra Associates.

caimp_detail.text:
CAIMP (Certified AI-Enabled Management Professional) prepares leaders to coordinate AI ecosystems.

You will learn:
• Data network management
• Partnerships and governance
• Cooperative operations
• Platform strategy

help_choose_track.text:
Let me help you choose.

Which best describes your interest?

peopleaihub_overview.text:
PeopleAIHub is our collaborative platform where professionals build People-First AI solutions.

Features include:
• Shared AI projects
• Developer collaboration
• Agent templates
• Community mentorship

Members can build tools used across the ecosystem.

platform_overview.text:
The People AI Platform provides shared infrastructure for the ecosystem.

It powers:
• Jana AI assistants
• Workflow automation
• Knowledge networks
• Ethical AI governance

janmitra_overview.text:
JanMitra means 'Friend of the People'.

JanMitra Associates are trained professionals who deliver trusted support services using Jana AI.

Benefits:
• Structured training
• AI-assisted workflows
• Cooperative income opportunities
• Community impact

summit_overview.text:
The People-First AI Summit showcases how professionals can lead the AI transformation.

At the summit:
• AI assistants demonstrations
• Cooperative service models
• Partner announcements
• Certification launches

join_menu.text: Great! What would you like to join?

faq_membership.text:
Membership benefits include:

• Access to certification programs
• Participation in PeopleAIHub projects
• Networking with professionals
• Participation in People-First AI initiatives

faq_eligibility.text:
Anyone interested in building or supporting AI-enabled systems can join.

Common roles include:
• Students
• Developers
• Support professionals
• Management professionals

faq_duration.text:
Certification durations vary depending on the track and learning pace.

Most programs combine:
• Guided coursework
• Practical projects
• Mentorship
